overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in 18th-century attire exploring an ornate historic interior with wood-paneled walls and classical paintings, transitioning from indoor corridors to an outdoor courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hallway with red wallpaper and classical paintings

events.description: character makes a left turn at the hallway intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hallway, observing the classical paintings and wood-paneled walls

notable_agents.action: man in period clothing sitting on green velvet bench
group of three people standing and conversing near the archway

entered.detail: large framed painting depicting a reclining figure on red drapery
dark mahogany wood paneling with decorative trim and red wallpaper
floor with alternating light and dark marble tiles in diamond pattern
upholstered bench with dark green fabric and wooden frame
decorative stone arch with classical molding at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an ornate hallway with dark wood paneling and red wallpaper, passing classical paintings and seated NPCs on green velvet benches. The marble floor has a checkered pattern, and the space is illuminated by warm artificial lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: connected corridors with varied wall treatments

events.description: hallway walls transition from red wallpaper to cream-colored plaster with wood trim
red carpet runner appears along the center of the hallway floor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the connected hallways, passing various NPCs and paintings while moving deeper into the building

notable_agents.action: man sitting alone on bench reading
group of people standing and conversing in the hallway

entered.detail: light cream-colored plaster walls with dark wood trim
dark wood paneled door with brass hardware
long burgundy carpet running down the center of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through transitional corridors where the architecture shifts from red wallpaper to cream plaster walls. A red carpet runner appears on the floor, and the character passes various NPCs seated on benches and standing in groups.

scene_state.functional_zone: long carpeted hallway leading to exterior exit

events.description: character approaches and walks through doorway into outdoor courtyard
dramatic shift from warm interior lighting to bright natural daylight

agents.ego_description: walking down the long hallway toward the exit, following two men, then stepping outside into the sunlit courtyard

notable_agents.action: two men in dark coats walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: tall open doorway with bright daylight streaming in from outside
sunlit outdoor area with cobblestone paving visible through the door
exterior stone walls and arched windows of the building visible outside
green metal park bench situated in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long hallway with a red carpet runner, following two men toward an exit. The scene transitions as the character steps through the doorway into a bright outdoor courtyard with cobblestone paths and historic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ornate historic interior that gradually opens into a bright outdoor courtyard. It begins in a hallway of dark wood paneling and red wallpaper, gliding past classical paintings and NPCs seated on green velvet benches over a checkered marble floor. As the character moves forward, the architecture shifts from red wallpaper to cream plaster walls and the flooring transitions to a red carpet runner. The scene then follows two men down a long corridor, maintaining the red carpet path before passing through a doorway. Finally, the interior space gives way to the open air of a sunlit courtyard featuring cobblestone paths and historic architecture.
